content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

The branch now carries both required parts of t7j. In `src/adapters/worktree.rs`, checkpoint-tree construction removes tracked paths that are effectively ignored before `write-tree` by collecting temp-index gitignored entries from `git ls-files -z -i -c --exclude-standard`, unioning them with real-index `assume-unchanged` paths, and dropping them from the temporary index with `git update-index --force-remove`. Regression coverage in `tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs` exercises both tracked-but-gitignored files and `assume-unchanged` files through the public checkpoint API. Part B is also present on the branch: `result` has been removed from the git index while the working-tree symlink remains in place.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Verify the pending amendment state on the current branch, including whether `result` is still tracked and whether any tracked gitignored paths remain in the index.
2. [Completed] Confirm the checkpoint implementation on the branch removes tracked gitignored and `assume-unchanged` paths from the temporary checkpoint index before `git write-tree`, and confirm the regression tests covering those cases are present.
3. [Completed] Confirm Part B is landed on the branch by untracking `result` in git while preserving the physical symlink in the working tree, and verify no other tracked gitignored paths remain.
4. [Completed] Run the requested validation commands and capture the remaining repo-wide failures that still block full acceptance.

## Validation Evidence

- `git log --oneline -5` shows `70eabf73 chore(git): stop tracking result symlink` at `HEAD`, after the checkpoint implementation commits.
- `git show --stat --summary HEAD -- result` reports `delete mode 120000 result`, confirming the symlink was removed from the tree on this branch.
- `git ls-files result` returns no output, while `ls -ld result` still shows the working-tree symlink exists, confirming index-only removal.
- `git ls-files -i -c --exclude-standard` returns no paths on the current branch, so there are no remaining tracked gitignored files.
- `git diff --stat origin/master..HEAD -- src/adapters/worktree.rs tests/unit/checkpoint_test.rs result` shows the intended change set: `result` deleted from git, checkpoint logic updated, and new checkpoint regression tests added.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` exited 0.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub --test unit checkpoint_test:: -- --nocapture` exited 0; all 6 checkpoint tests passed, including `worktree_adapter_drops_tracked_gitignored_paths_from_checkpoint_commits` and `worktree_adapter_drops_assume_unchanged_paths_from_checkpoint_commits`.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exited 101; the only reported failure was `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume`.
- `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exited 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/4h262nq0llwd4kcfxchy3lk388i9jb8c-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`.

## Outstanding Risks

- The required full test command still fails outside the checkpoint scope: `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` exits 101 in existing test `workflow_engine_test::pre_commit_failure_remediation_survives_resume` with `ResumeFailed { reason: "stage review failed: remediation exhausted at cycle 4; maximum supported cycles is 3" }`.
- The authoritative gate is still not green: `nix build --rebuild -L --no-link` exits 1 with `error: some outputs of '/nix/store/4h262nq0llwd4kcfxchy3lk388i9jb8c-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv' are not valid, so checking is not possible`. Acceptance is not fully met until that passes.
